meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve No Marketing Skills
content.seo_description: Learn how to master user onboarding to overcome a lack of marketing skills. A beginner-level tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code for your first app.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing budget to grow; you need a frictionless onboarding experience. By automating user education and value delivery within your app, you turn every visitor into a power user. This tutorial shows you how to build high-conversion onboarding flows using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks perfecting your code, but the silence from your launch is deafening. The 'build it and they will come' myth is the quickest way for a student project to die in obscurity. Marketing feels like an insurmountable wall when you are a developer, but you are looking at the problem from the wrong angle.

Instead of chasing traffic, focus on the users already at your doorstep. By implementing a world-class onboarding flow, you stop the 'leaky bucket' syndrome. When your app teaches users its own value, it markets itself. Let's transform your UI from a cold interface into a guided, high-conversion journey that turns strangers into advocates.

steps.title: Define User Value Moments
steps.description: Identify the 'Aha!' moment—the exact point where a user realizes your app solves their problem. We will map this to a sequence of 3 onboarding steps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project codebase and identify the core value proposition. Propose a 3-step 'Aha!' moment onboarding sequence that guides users to their first successful action.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file=app/core.py --prompt='Map the critical path for a new user to achieve their first success.'

steps.title: Build the Guided UI Overlay
steps.description: Create a non-intrusive interactive walkthrough that highlights key features without cluttering the workspace.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a lightweight, modular React onboarding component that uses a step-by-step tooltip overlay to highlight core features.

steps.title: Implement Progress Tracking
steps.description: Users are more likely to finish onboarding if they see progress. We will add a visual progress bar to the onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add a progress indicator to the onboarding component that tracks completion status and persists user state to local storage.

steps.title: Automate Welcome Email Triggers
steps.description: Connect your onboarding flow to an email service to ensure users return to the app if they drop off halfway through.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a backend service function that triggers a 'Resume Onboarding' email if a user stops mid-flow for more than 10 minutes.

steps.title: A/B Test the Call-to-Action
steps.description: Optimize your conversion rates by testing different final prompts in your onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a simple A/B testing wrapper for the final CTA button in my onboarding flow, tracking clicks to a mock analytics endpoint.

pro_tips: Never ask for account creation before the user experiences the core value; let them test the app first.
Keep your onboarding under 60 seconds; every additional step decreases completion rates by 20%.
Use 'Progressive Disclosure': hide advanced settings until the user has performed the core action at least once.
Personalize the welcome message based on the user's referral source to build instant rapport.
Always include a 'Skip' button; forcing users through onboarding creates resentment rather than retention.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment, gather feedback from three peers, and iterate on the drop-off points.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped to turn your code into a product that converts. Stop worrying about traditional marketing and start building experiences that users love. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
